blockingIssues.description: The rerun fixes the history-side duplicate empty-object `{}` attribution and keeps the public `InputItem` API unchanged, but `empty_json_object_identity` in `crates/agents-core/src/internal/session_persistence.rs` now hashes raw `serde_json::Map` bytes via `unsafe { std::slice::from_raw_parts(...) }`, which relies on private layout and potentially uninitialized bytes instead of a safe internal sidecar identity.
